source_rationale: CD69 is an early T/NK cell activation marker, indicating activated lymphocytes
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK cells and NKT cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by activated T cells and NK cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule of NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein characteristic of NK and cytotoxic T cells
IL7R marks T lymphocytes, particularly memory and tissue-resident T cells
CD3E is a core component of the T cell receptor complex, confirming T cell identity
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T and NK cells
CST7 (cystatin F) is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes and supports immune effector function
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein, indicating lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
Gamma-crystallin S is a lens fiber cell structural protein
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development and differentiation
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
GJA8 (connexin 50) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in lens and retinal progenitor maintenance
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells for water transport
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in antigen-presenting B cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell lineage marker
CD79A is a B cell receptor signaling component and B cell marker
MHC class II expression is characteristic of B cells and antigen-presenting cells
BANK1 is a B cell scaffold protein specific to B lymphocytes
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed in B cells transitioning to plasma cells
IRF8 is a transcription factor important for B cell and dendritic cell development
LINC00926 is a B cell-specific long non-coding RNA
KRT3 is a cornea-specific keratin marking differentiated corneal epithelial cells
KRT12 is a corneal epithelium-specific keratin
Claudin-4 is a tight junction protein of differentiated epithelial cells
Claudin-7 is a tight junction protein marking epithelial differentiation
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor
MAL is a lipid raft protein expressed in differentiated epithelial cells
Desmoplakin is a desmosomal component of stratified epithelial cells
LY6D is a surface marker of epithelial cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts in connective tissue
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Fibulin-1 is an extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Complement C1r is produced by fibroblasts as part of innate immunity
Transgelin marks mesenchymal/fibroblast lineage cells
PLA2G2A is a secreted phospholipase enriched in stromal fibroblasts
Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein marking specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
ONECUT2 is a transcription factor involved in retinal horizontal and ganglion cell specification

NDRG4 is enriched in neurons including retinal ganglion cells

Contactin-associated protein 2 is a neuronal cell adhesion molecule
SLC4A3 is an anion exchanger expressed in retinal horizontal cells
MEG3 is a maternally expressed imprinted lncRNA enriched in stromal/mesenchymal cells
FOSB is an immediate early gene indicating transcriptionally active/stress-responsive cells
TIMP3 is a matrix metalloproteinase inhibitor expressed in stromal cells
RARRES1 is a retinoic acid-responsive gene in mesenchymal/stromal cells
COBLL1 is expressed in mesenchymal cells and involved in cytoskeletal organization
CDKN1A (p21) indicates cell cycle arrest, suggesting quiescent stromal cells
NR4A1 is an immediate early gene marking activated or stress-responsive mesenchymal cells
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanocyte-specific enzyme in melanin biosynthesis

MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte differentiation antigen

TRPM1 is a melanocyte-specific ion channel regulated by MITF
IGFBP5 is enriched in stromal fibroblasts

ANGPTL7 is specifically expressed in corneal keratocytes
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of keratocytes

PRRX1 is a homeobox transcription factor marking mesenchymal/fibroblast identity
ABCA8 is a lipid transporter enriched in corneal keratocytes
Matrix Gla protein is produced by stromal cells and involved in ECM regulation
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine highly expressed by activated macrophages
C1QA is a complement component characteristic of tissue-resident macrophages

TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for myeloid cell signaling

TYROBP is a myeloid signaling adaptor distinguishing this as a myeloid cluster
